metadata.title: Quick Tagger
metadata.description: Add and remove tags quickly. Tag search results, bulk tag, and add dedicated buttons/commands for your favorites!

regex.source: .setText("Starred tags get special treatment. Click or hover over these buttons for more details \u{1F449}")
regex.target: .setText("星号标签得到特殊处理。单击或将鼠标悬停在这些按钮上以获取更多详细信息 \u{1F449}")

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, only Starred Tags will be shown in the tag selection dialog.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用，只有星号标签将显示在标签选择对话框中")

regex.source: .setDesc('Helper to replace spaces in input with a preffered tag style. "None" will just remove invalid characters.')
regex.target: .setDesc('使用首选标记样式替换输入中的空格。“None”只会删除无效字符')
.setTooltip("首先在标签选择对话框中显示")
name: `切换最近使用的标签（无）`
.setTitle("从文件 " + files.length + " 中移除标签...")
.setTitle("从笔记 " + files.length + " 中移除标签...")
.log(`修复 ${f.basename}' 的 yaml 的损坏部分。。。`

regex.source: msg = "This will delete all tags on the active note(s), are you sure?"
regex.target: msg = "这将删除活动笔记上的所有标签，您确定吗?"

regex.source: msg = "The first toggle on a starred tag moves it to the top of the list when selecting a tag for your notes."
regex.target: msg = "为笔记选择标记时，星号标记上的第一个切换会将其移动到列表顶部。"

regex.source: msg = "The second toggle on a starred tag adds a command for it so you can create a hotkey, etc."
regex.target: msg = "星号标记上的第二个切换为其添加了一个命令，以便您可以创建热键等。"

regex.source: msg = "The third toggle on a starred tag adds a button for it to the status bar."
regex.target: msg = "星号标记上的第三个切换将其按钮添加到状态栏中。"

regex.source: msg = "The fourth toggle on a starred tag adds it to the context menu."
regex.target: msg = "星号标记上的第四个切换将其添加到上下文菜单中。"

regex.source: msg = "The up arrow button moves the starred tag up on the starred tag list. This affects the order it's displayed in the tag selection dialog."
regex.target: msg = "向上箭头按钮将星号标记在星号标记列表中向上移动。这会影响它在标记选择对话框中的显示顺序。"

regex.source: msg = "The down arrow button moves the starred tag down on the starred tag list. This affects the order it's displayed in the tag selection dialog."
regex.target: msg = "向下箭头按钮将星号标记在星号标记列表中向下移动。这会影响它在标记选择对话框中的显示顺序。"

regex.source: msg = "The trash can button removes the starred tag from the starred list."
regex.target: msg = "垃圾桶按钮从星号列表中删除星号标签。"

regex.source: .Notice("ERROR: No recent tag, please assign a tag with Quick Tagger before using this command"
regex.target: .Notice("错误:  没有最近的标记，请在使用此命令之前使用 Quick Tagger 分配一个标签"

regex.source: tofrom = mode == "add" ? " added to " : " removed from ";
regex.target: tofrom = mode == "add" ? " 被添加到 " : " 被移除从 ";
